seo.title: Why Fiberglass Pools Make Sense | Maxima Pools - Columbus, OH
seo.description: Discover why fiberglass pool construction outperforms gunite and vinyl. Hand-laid layers, 17x stronger than concrete, less maintenance, faster installation. San Juan Pools dealer in Columbus, OH.
seo.ogTitle: Why Fiberglass Pools Make Sense | Maxima Pools
seo.ogDescription: Compare fiberglass vs gunite vs vinyl. See why San Juan hand-laid fiberglass pools are stronger, lower maintenance, and built to last decades.

hero.subtitle: Strength through precision. Each San Juan pool includes a minimum of five hand-laid fiberglass layers, creating a structure built to last for decades.

benefitsSection.intro: Compare for yourself and see why fiberglass pool construction consistently outperforms gunite and vinyl options.

benefits.title: Unmatched Durability
benefits.description: All-weather tolerant, stress-free, and pet friendly. A fiberglass pool is 17x stronger than concrete and flexes with ground movement instead of cracking.

benefits.title: Minimal Maintenance
benefits.description: Less than 1 hour per week vs. 5+ hours for gunite or vinyl. The smooth, non-porous surface resists algae and requires minimal chemicals.

benefits.title: Rapid Installation
benefits.description: Installed in days, not weeks or months. Factory-manufactured with controlled quality assurance means your pool arrives ready to set.

benefits.title: Algae Resistant
benefits.description: The smooth gel coat surface prevents algae from adhering — unlike porous concrete where algae grows through the walls.

benefits.title: Energy Efficient
benefits.description: Circulate just 4–6 hours per day vs. 10 hours for gunite. Lower electrical usage means lower bills year after year.

benefits.title: No Repairs Needed
benefits.description: No acid washes, no replastering, no liner replacements. When properly maintained, a fiberglass pool requires zero structural repairs.

guaranteeSection.paragraph: With a San Juan pool, every shell is built to the same uncompromising standard — no shortcuts, no substitutions.
guaranteeSection.imageAlt: San Juan fiberglass pool — guaranteed quality
guarantees: All fiberglass is 100% hand-laid — never sprayed
32-mil gel coat — thickest in the industry (two 16-mil layers)
Minimum of 5 fiberglass layers per shell
No coring, fillers, chopped fiberglass, or safety ledges

comparisonSection.intro: See how San Juan fiberglass stacks up against the competition across every category that matters.

rows.fiberglass: All-weather tolerant, stress-free, pet friendly, 17x stronger than concrete
rows.gunite: Rigid structure, cracks with ground movement
rows.vinyl: Punctures and tears easily, not pet friendly

rows.fiberglass: Factory manufactured with controlled quality assurance
rows.gunite: On-site constructed, quality dependent on workforce
Very rough — equivalent to 80 grit sandpaper
Constant problem, grows through porous walls
Shallow end stairs only — additions cost extra

differenceSection.paragraph: Despite clear evidence that hand-laid fiberglass produces a stronger result, many competitors still use chopped fiberglass methods — reducing quality and consistency.
chopDownsides: No consistency in fiberglass thickness — depends on spray gun duration
Resin concentrates in random areas, creating uneven layers
Requires "safety ledges" that weaken the shell and collect dirt
Weaker structural integrity under freeze-thaw conditions
handlaidBenefits: Consistent thickness throughout the entire mold
Even resin and woven roving distribution front to back
Stronger design with no safety ledges needed

cta.paragraph: Talk to our team today and discover why fiberglass is the smartest investment for your backyard.
